word: G1880 - ἐπανέρχομαι - epanérchomai - ep-an-er'-khom-ahee - Come again

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπανέρχομαι

- Transliteration: Epanerchomai

- Phonetic: ep-an-er'-khom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to return, come back again

- Origin: from G1909 and G424

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and G424; to come up on that is return: - come again return.
